hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2) if 'grammar.go' in p and 'grammar.peg' not in p else sys.exit(0)"

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(0) if not p.endswith('.go') else None" && GOOS=linux go build ./... 2>&1 | head -5 && GOOS=windows go build ./... 2>&1 | head -5
